data.project_description: A microservices-based chronic disease care platform for healthcare management. The system enables patients to upload and manage health reports, doctors to manage schedules and patient care workflows, and provides AI-powered schedule recommendations. Built on Spring Boot with Dubbo RPC, it implements JWT-based authentication, RBAC authorization, and integrates with third-party services for SMS, email, and cloud storage.
data.business_value: Streamlines chronic disease management by connecting patients with doctors through digital health records, automated scheduling, and AI-assisted care planning. Reduces administrative burden on healthcare providers while improving patient engagement and care continuity.

target_users.name: Patient
target_users.description: Individuals with chronic conditions who need ongoing medical care and health monitoring
needs: Upload and manage health reports (images, PDFs, text)

target_users.name: Doctor
target_users.description: Healthcare providers managing chronic disease patients
needs: View patient health reports with permission controls
Complete consultations and upload diagnostic reports

target_users.name: Family Member
target_users.description: Relatives or caregivers of patients with limited access rights

external_systems.name: Alibaba Cloud OSS
external_systems.description: Object storage service for health report files (images, PDFs)

external_systems.name: SMS Gateway
external_systems.description: Third-party SMS service for notifications and verification codes

external_systems.name: Email Service
external_systems.description: Email delivery service for notifications and attachments

external_systems.name: Nacos
external_systems.description: Service registry and configuration center for microservices

external_systems.name: Redis
external_systems.description: Distributed cache for JWT tokens, refresh tokens, blacklists, and permission caching

external_systems.name: MySQL
external_systems.description: Primary relational database for all business data

external_systems.name: Sentinel
external_systems.description: Flow control and circuit breaker for API gateway

system_boundary.scope: Chronic disease care management platform covering user authentication, health report management, doctor scheduling, and messaging services
included_components: API Gateway - Request routing, JWT validation, rate limiting, CORS
Account Management Service - User registration, login, RBAC permissions
Auth Server - JWT token generation, validation, refresh token management
Health Report Center - Report upload, storage, query, audit workflow
Doctor Service - Schedule management, AI recommendations, workbench APIs
Message System - Push notifications, SMS, email delivery
Third-Party Service - OSS integration, SMS/email adapters
Utils Module - Security annotations, encryption handlers, interceptors
